map_coverage: {done} ye-{total} yezixeko ezihlalutyiweyo ukuza kuthi ga ngoku - ezinye zongezwa usuku nosuku.
cur_so_far: {year} ukuza kuthi ga ngoku (ukuya ku-{day} {month}): {v} °C ngokomndilili, {d} °C vs 1961-1990 kuthetha iintsuku ezifanayo zonyaka.
cmp_hint: Igophe ngalinye seso sixeko sonyaka esingaqhelekanga ngokuchasene nesiseko saso sika-1961-1990, ke iindawo ezinemozulu eyahlukileyo zithelekisa ngokufanelekileyo.
sum_season: Elona xesha lokufudumala ngokukhawuleza apha: {season} ({v} °C ngeshumi leminyaka).
sum_month: Eyona nyanga ikhawulezayo yokufudumala apha: {month} ({v} °C ngeshumi leminyaka).
grid_alias_note: Irekhodi yobushushu ibalwa nge ~11 km yeseli yegridi yemozulu-data. {alias} yabelana ngeseli yayo no-{city}, ngoko ke zombini zibonisa imbali efanayo ye-1940-yangoku.
guide_body:
• Amachaphaza / imivalo: ixabiso lonyaka ngamnye.
  • Igophe elinombala oBold: i-LOESS egudileyo: intsingiselo yendawo, ikhululekile ukugoba, ukuze ukwazi ukubona utshintsho lwesantya emva kwexesha (e. ~1985).
  • Umgca odayiweyo: umkhombandlela othe ngqo we-robust (Theil-Sen); ukuthambeka kwawo “lishumi ngalinye leminyaka” kwintsomi.
  • p<0.05 / n.s.: Ukubaluleka kukaMann-Kendall: nokuba imeko iyinyani ngokwezibalo okanye inokuba yingxolo (n.s. = ayibalulekanga). Iqondo lobushushu lidla ngokubaluleke kakhulu; imvula isoloko ingabikho.
  • Shaded band: uluhlu olupheleleyo lwembali kuyo yonke iminyaka yaloo nyanga.
  • Heatmap imibalaiqondo lobushushu eliluhlaza → ebomvu → ebandayo ebomvu funda ikholamu ukusuka ezantsi ukuya phezulu ukuze ubukele loo nyanga itshintsha ngokuhamba kweminyaka.
subtitle: {start}-{end} · {days} iintsuku · eyona nto ishushu {wy} ({wv:.1f} °C), ebandayo {cy} ({cv:.1f} °C)
analog_line: Ngo-2050, imozulu yendawo inokuvakala ngakumbi njenge {analog} yenza namhlanje, malunga nokufudumala kwe +{d} °C.
analog_past: Ngo-1940, imozulu yasekuhlaleni yavakala ngakumbi njenge-{analog} namhlanje, malunga ne-{d} °C epholileyo.
cap_yearly: Intsingiselo yonyaka kunye ne-LOESS egudileyo (ibonisa ukukhawulezisa) kunye nentsingiselo eyomeleleyo ye-Theil-Sen +ukubaluleka
cap_anomalies: Unyaka ngamnye xa kuthelekiswa nomyinge we-1961-1990: imivalo ebomvu efudumeleyo, ipholile eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka. Ukutshintsha ukusuka kumbala oluhlaza ukuya kubomvu ubukhulu becala kukufudumala.
cap_heatmap: I-avareji yenyanga nganye kunyaka ngamnye njengegridi yombala (2 °C bands). Funda ikholamu ukuya phezulu ukuze ubukele loo nyanga ishushu kumashumi eminyaka.
cap_anom_heatmap: Igridi efanayo, kodwa nyanga nganye ilinganiswa ngokuchasene neyakhe i-1961-1990 eqhelekileyo, ngoko ke utshintsho lubonisa kuphela (ubushushu obomvu kunesiqhelo, i-blue cooler), umjikelo wonyaka ususiwe.
cap_threshold: Iintsuku ngonyaka ngamnye ngaphezu kwe-18 °C (kushushu) nangaphantsi kwe-0 °C (umkhenkce). Ezi ndlela zimbini zokuwela zithetha ukuba iintsuku ezishushu ngoku zodlula iintsuku eziqhaqhazelisa amazinyo.
hint: Cofa naphi na okanye ucofe u-Esc ukuvala
intro: Izixeko ezikhulu zehlabathi ziye zafudumala njani ukusukela ngo-1940: iirekhodi zobushushu bemihla ngemihla ukusuka kuhlaziyo lwemozulu lwe-ERA5.
omni_ph: Khangela isixeko, ilizwe, ummandla okanye nayiphi na indawo
range_title: Uluhlu lwamaqondo obushushu enyanga kuyo yonke iminyaka, {name}
cap_range: Inyanga nganye imin-max uluhlu ngokuhamba kweminyaka, kunye nonyaka wamva nje. Ingaba kukuwola ubushushu?
record_title: Ingxelo yenyanga ephezulu / ephantsi yobushushu bemihla ngemihla, {name}
cap_records: Irekhodi yexesha lonke yenyanga yonke imihla iphezulu kwaye iphantsi, kunye nokugqithiswa konyaka wamva nje
cap_volatility: Kukangaphi ukutsiba okukhulu kobushushu bemihla ngemihla kwenzeka ngonyaka ngamnye (≥6 °C), ukuguquguquka kweqondo lobushushu
cap_precip: Iyonke imvula yonyaka (imvula namanzi ekhephu) enentsingiselo
cap_stripes: Umgca ngamnye bubushushu bonyaka omnye: iblue cooler, ubushushu obubomvu kunomndilili we-1961-1990. I-drift ukusuka eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka ukuya ebomvu kukufudumala, kungekho nto yokufunda ngaphandle kombala.
cap_season: Ubude bexesha lokukhula okushushu rhoqo ngonyaka (ukuqhuba kweentsuku ezinemilinganiselo yemihla ngemihla ≥ 5 °C): ukulinywa kweefestile ezingenaqabaka kuxhomekeke ekwandiseni njengoko imozulu ishushu.
cap_dtr: Umsantsa ophakathi phakathi kosuku ngalunye oluphezulu noluphantsi. Uluhlu olunciphayo luphawu lweminwe eluhlaza: ubusuku bufudumala ngokukhawuleza kuneentsuku; Ukwandiswa kunokubonisa ukomisa.
cap_seasonshift: Umndilili wonyaka wokuqala vs. ishumi lokugqibela lerekhodi. Umsantsa phakathi kweegophe kwinyanga nganye ubonisa ukuba zeziphi iindawo zonyaka ezifudumala kakhulu (ubusika buhlala bungaphezu kwehlobo).
health_sub: Iintsingiselo zokufudumala zingentla ziguqukela kubushushu obaziwayo-, ukubanda- kunye neemetric zokuvezwa kwesiganeko esigqithisileyo. Itshathi nganye ibonakala apho idatha eyidingayo ifumaneka khona.
cap_degreedays: Umthwalo wonyaka we-thermal-comfort: imfuno yokufudumeza (ngaphantsi kwe-18 °C) iwela ngelixa imfuno yokupholisa (ngaphezu kwe-22 °C) inyuka, i-proxy yokuvezwa okubandayo kunye nemfuno yokupholisa umoya.
cap_heatwave: Iintsuku kumaza obushushu: ukubaleka kweentsuku ezi-≥3 kunye nokuphakama kwemihla ngemihla ngaphezu kwe-1961-1990 yepesenti ye-90 yendawo. Ubushushu obuzinzileyo emini ngoyena mqhubi uphambili wokufa okugqithisileyo kwamaza obushushu.
cap_tropic: Ubusuku xa iqondo eliphantsi lihlala okanye lingaphezulu kwe-20 °C, ngoko ke umzimba awufumani siqabu ebusuku, umqhubi okhokelayo, ohlala engahoywa wokufa okunxulumene nobushushu.
cap_coldspell: Iintsuku kwi-spell ebanda: ukuqhutyelwa kweentsuku ze-≥3 kunye nemihla ngemihla ephantsi ngaphantsi kwe-1961-1990 yepesenti ye-10 yendawo. Ukubanda ixesha elide kuqhuba ubusika bentliziyo kunye nokufa okugqithisileyo kokuphefumla.
cap_heavyrain: Iintsuku ezinobuncinci i-20 mm yemvula (ETCCDI R20mm), izandyondyo zemvula ezibangela ukwenzakala, ukufuduswa kunye nesifo esibangelwa ngamanzi.
cap_heatindex: Iintsuku iqondo lobushushu elibonakalayo (isalathiso sobushushu, esigoqeka kumswakama) sifikelela kumanqanaba oxinzelelo lobushushu, kusetyenziswa i-metric yobushushu boluntu. Ifuna iseti yedatha yobushushu obubonakalayo.
footer: Yenziwe {date} · idatha esuka Open-Meteo uhlaziyo lwembali (ERA5) · source kwiGitHub
qv_baseline: Ishumi leminyaka eliphakathi ngokuchasene nesiseko sika-1961-1990
qv_chart_alt: Ukufudumala kweshumi leminyaka, itshathi yendawo egcweleyo
